name: runbook
description: Operational runbook template for services and deployments.

variables.name: deployment_steps
variables.description: Deployment steps as numbered HTML list

variables.name: rollback_steps
variables.description: Rollback steps as numbered HTML list

body:
Runbook: {{ service_name }} v{{ service_version }}

Owner: {{ owner_team }}
On-call: {{ oncall_contact }}
Health check: {{ health_check_url }}

Service Overview

{{ service_overview }}

Deployment

    {{ deployment_steps }}

Rollback Procedure

    {{ rollback_steps }}

Monitoring

    {{ monitoring_links }}

Known Issues

    {{ known_issues }}

Escalation Path

  1. Check monitoring dashboard
  2. Review recent deployments
  3. Page on-call: {{ oncall_contact }}
  4. Escalate to {{ owner_team }} team lead
